arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain created several chances but couldn’t find the back of the net, losing 1-0 to Liverpool on Wednesday night at the Parc des Princes in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 tie. arts.ttl: Liverpool Was Willing to Offer €100M for 24-Year-Old Who Featured in PSG’s First Leg Defeat
arts.sum: Last summer, Khvicha Kvaratskhelia was in high demand as several clubs were linked to him, but Napoli stood firm in keeping the player despite no contract extension in place. Liverpool was among the suitors willing to pay top dollar to secure the Georgian. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Near Extension of Arsenal, PSG Target Who Recorded Four Key Passes vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been closely monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months, nearly signing him last summer. However, their second attempt to land the veteran may fall short again. Christian Falk’s latest report reveals that Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich has received a strong offer from PSG. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain had plenty of scoring chances in their 1-0 first-leg loss to Liverpool on Wednesday night at Parc des Princes, but Alisson Becker stole the show, keeping the home side off the scoresheet. The Ligue 1 club dominated the first half, outshooting Liverpool 12-1, but couldn’t capitalize.
